title: [YTP] Chairman Biscuit Hates Gears of War 2
description:
'Heard there's a shit there Seargent.

Some sentence mixing may be crude or hard to understand. This is my first time trying it so its not my absolute best but I thought I'd post something for '09.

I do not own anything used in this video. Gears of War 2 and basically everything in this video belong to Epic games and Microsoft. This video is only for entertainment purposes.
